The ''[[Kulless Squall]]'' was a unique [[Podracer/Legends|podracer]] of custom design that had been created by the former podracer mechanic [[Shrivel Braittrand]]. When Braittrand's employer, [[Boles Roor/Legends|Boles Roor]], quit podracing for a singing career, Braittrand scrapped Roor's podracer and built the ''Kulless Squall'' from scratch.<ref name="RRPG" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Racer Revenge]]''
